scripts.build:all: (cd viz-abm-emotion-main && npm install && npm run build) ; mkdir -p public/andorra && cp -r viz-abm-emotion-main/dist/. public/andorra/ && mkdir -p public/earth && cp -r vertex-earth-interactive/. public/earth/ && cd transit-builder && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p public/transit-builder && cp -r transit-builder/dist/. public/transit-builder/ && npm run build
